pages.text: Every Skyseed is crafted, then thrown. Here is how to make each one. Craft a seed to unlock its field notes.
The $(item)Forest Skyseed$() — dirt and planks.
The $(item)Large Forest Skyseed$() — a pricier, bigger island.
The $(item)Rocky Skyseed$() — stone and cobblestone.
The $(item)Large Rocky Skyseed$() — a tall mountain with emeralds.
The $(item)Desert Skyseed$() — sand over sandstone.
The $(item)Large Desert Skyseed$() — big dunes with an oasis.
The $(item)Mushroom Skyseed$() — dirt with both mushrooms.
The $(item)Large Mushroom Skyseed$() — a giant mushroom grove.
The $(item)Frozen Skyseed$() — snow and ice.
The $(item)Large Frozen Skyseed$() — a glacier with a frozen lake.
The $(item)Meadow Skyseed$() — dirt and any flower.
The $(item)Large Meadow Skyseed$() — a vast flower field with bees.
The $(item)Badlands Skyseed$() — red sand and terracotta.
The $(item)Large Badlands Skyseed$() — a towering banded mesa.
The $(item)Ancient Skyseed$() — deepslate and cobbled deepslate.
The $(item)Large Ancient Skyseed$() — a deep slab, diamonds and geodes.
The $(item)Lush Skyseed$() — moss block and azalea.
The $(item)Large Lush Skyseed$() — a bigger lush isle with a deep pool.
The $(item)Aquatic Skyseed$() — clay and sand.
The $(item)Large Aquatic Skyseed$() — a proper deep lake.
This Almanac — a book crafted with any Skyseed.
